data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. GRAFFITI has been hard to follow lately, running fifth (22.76) last time but prior to that ran very well when placed at Bendigo. Expecting sharp improvement this line-up. 6. PUT IT TOGETHER has missed the placings at his last couple but was in the money three back when second (23.68) at Horsham in a Grade 5. Can hit the frame this time. 1. TAT BUDDY had the drop on the lead before drawing clear to score (22.62) at this track in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 over 390m. Won at his only start from this box. Has definite claims. 2. KRAKEN PADDY must be respected despite an unplaced effort here most recently.","runners":[4,6,1,2],"exclusive":false}
